plugins.name: unreal-kit
plugins.description: Unreal Engine automation: Python API for asset inspection and data extraction; MCP server for live Editor authoring (actors, Blueprints, materials, PIE)

plugins.name: cache-kit
plugins.description: Cache usage reporting - per-request and session-level cache hit analysis from Claude Code transcripts

plugins.name: test-plugin
plugins.description: Test plugin exercising all 5 bootstrap steps including Claude-driven config setup

plugins.name: bootstrap
plugins.description: Centralized bootstrap engine for Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: p4-kit
plugins.description: Multi-agent code review of pending Perforce changelists via /p4-code-review (parallel Claude subagents). Shares chunking + CLAUDE.md primitives with git-kit via bootstrap_lib.code_review.

plugins.name: git-kit
plugins.description: Git + GitHub multi-agent code review (/git-code-review) plus gh CLI bootstrap (auth + optional org membership). Shares chunking + CLAUDE.md primitives with p4-kit via bootstrap_lib.code_review.

plugins.name: skills-kit
plugins.description: Skill authoring + shared audit framework. Vocabulary, type contracts, single-skill audit (/skill-audit), cross-reference audit/remediation (/references-audit), and the canonical audit-framework (primitives, compositions, audit-kinds, viewer-kinds) that other plugins' audits and viewers ride on.

plugins.name: claude-ui-kit
plugins.description: Claude Code status line with context-window and rate-limit threshold colors, plus the /statusline skill to inspect and customize it.

plugins.name: awesome-kit
plugins.description: Christina's cross-domain skills: a shared communication framework (hand-off + verbose-updates), the update-documentation meta-skill, /plugin-ecosystem (interactive 16:9 HTML poster of marketplaces and plugins), and /html-pdf (convert an HTML file to PDF via headless Chromium and open it). Depends on plugins-kit:skills-kit for the shared audit framework and knowledge-encoding. /claude-explorer moved to plugins-kit:prototypes in 0.5.0.

plugins.name: prototypes
plugins.description: Experimental skills that may graduate into their own plugins. Currently hosts /claude-explorer (Omarchy-style HTML browser of ~/.claude/ + the current project, Python crawl + local HTTP serve + embedded SPA). Depends on plugins-kit:skills-kit for the shared audit framework.

plugins.name: openrouter-kit
plugins.description: OpenRouter API key management and account validation: shared library, CLI, and bootstrap-time credential check that other plugins/projects depend on for OpenRouter access
